title: Repeat Engine
brief: Use search, cgn, and repeat to patch recurring tokens quickly.
objectives: Replace every ERROR token with OK in events.log.
hints: Repeat with n and . until all hits are fixed, then :w and ./stage check.
primary_path: Use `n` then `.` repeatedly to apply the same change fast.
fallback_path: If pattern is missed, use `N` to step back to previous match.
why_path: `cgn` + repeat builds fast, precise multi-hit edits you can reuse in many real files.
pro_move: Any repeated local change becomes much faster once `.` is part of your muscle memory.
